summary: Evidence bundle for Crete instantiates all 254 canonical registry rows. It now has 231 cited or reference-backed rows, 23 completed source-gap rows, and 0 rows still marked source_search_required. This pass closed light_pollution as a medium-confidence VIIRS nighttime-radiance proxy from the Zenodo/OpenGeoHub 2024 COG, with a priority-town regional summary for Crete. Light_pollution now cites the Zenodo/OpenGeoHub 2024 VIIRS nighttime-lights COG derived from NOAA/EOG Annual VNL V2.2 as a medium-confidence 2 km representative-town circle radiance proxy, with source version, checksum, sample radius, sample counts, units, and source-scale conversion recorded in each row. It is not Bortle class, a stargazing guarantee, a streetlight inventory, safety advice, health advice, property advice, a parcel measure, or a neighborhood measure. Earlier pass closed wildfire_egress_proxy as a low-confidence OpenStreetMap connected motor-road component and car-dependency proxy under cited ThinkHazard national wildfire context. Earlier passes closed drought_frequency_proxy, forest_cover_pct, tree_canopy_pct, surface_water_density, water_stress_baseline, pollen_severity, emergency_vet_proxy, and seasonal_service_dropoff_proxy as bounded proxies. Chania airport_summer_direct_destinations is closed only for Chania; other selected airport or regional parent rows still need their own official timetable read where the same row remains blocked. It is now data_bundle_ready, not because those transport rows became facts, but because Data Desk completed source discovery and kept the unresolved official timetable rows as visible source_bot_blocked_manual_needed gaps: airport_winter_direct_destinations, airport_summer_direct_destinations, airport_winter_route_ratio, ferry_routes_winter, ferry_routes_summer. The 2026-06-30 source-family review confirmed: CHQ winter has no public official countable NW26/27 destination set after the public CHQ/Fraport endpoint ends on 2026-10-24; HER official HCAA/HSCA/HASP sources confirm airport context but do not expose seasonal destination counts; ferry HCG/YNANP declarations, modification PDFs, port authorities, and operator pages do not provide a current extractable winter/summer unique route-pair count by selected port without manual reconciliation or licensed feeds. Page Factory may use the bundle only if these rows render as source gaps, not zeros or inferred service counts. Future fills must use the transport-schedule manual intake with dated official exports or licensed schedule data. National, regional, local, inherited, proxy, unavailable, blocked, or deferred labels must remain honest.
